summary: Implemented the `artifactEmit` extension hook: added `runArtifactEmit` to `run.mjs` which writes returned artifact content to the task artifacts directory and returns descriptors merged into the gate handshake. Also fixed the dead-code traversal guard in `extension-loader.mjs` (unreachable branch identified in the simplicity review) and added 10 new tests covering both the `fireExtension('artifactEmit', ...)` fan-out and the `runArtifactEmit` write/descriptor logic.
